PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\Barak\\Projects\\code-healer; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend --reload-dir agent --port 8000')
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/runs -UseBasicParsing; "backend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "backend not ready: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing; "frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "frontend not ready: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/runs -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; $r | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { "id=$\($_.id.Substring\(0,8\)\) status=$\($_.status\) file=$\($_.file_path\)" })

PowerShell($runs = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/runs -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; $id = $runs[0].id; $d = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/runs/$id/diff" -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($d.diff\) { "diff endpoint OK, diff length=$\($d.diff.Length\) chars" } else { "diff is empty/null" })
